context.description:
## Objetivo
Pesquisa de oportunidade financeira/estrategica identificada em tweet. Explorar em profundidade e responder as 3 perguntas obrigatorias.

## Contexto
- **Tweet original:** https://x.com/adiix_official/status/2031175021280837740?s=20
- **Autor:** @adiix_official
- **Texto do tweet:** Anthropic released an update for Claude, and one young guy turned $1,400 into $238,000 in 11 days

His account is 0xdE17.

He is not a trader. Not a developer. Just a student with a laptop and access to C

spawn_params.title: Research: @adiix_official — $1.4k > $238k em 11 dias com Claude (wallet 0xdE17)
